title: Alia
description: Explore the Moon, but not the one you know.
body:
## Alia, 1st one of the 3 Moons of Planet Szok

Made using [Mcreator](https://mcreator.net/).

Using [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) is recommended.

Future compatibility with my other mods.

Mod was made with Shaders in mind, the atmosphere might feel lacking and bland without the use of them. My personal recommendations are [Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) and [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) Minecraft Shaders.

Check out [Ather Remade](https://modrinth.com/mod/ather-remade), a Mod from the same multiverse futuring a sky like dimension.

## This Mod Adds:
- 1 new moon themed dimension to explore
- 3 new biomes
- few building blocks and plants
